name: Corsair Vengeance DDR5 32GB
description: The Corsair Vengeance DDR5 32GB (often sold as a 2x16GB kit) is a premium, high-speed RAM kit designed for modern gaming PCs and content creation workstations. It delivers exceptional bandwidth, on-board voltage regulation for stable overclocking, and a compact heatspreader for wide cooler compatibility.

name: G.Skill Trident Z5 RGB 32GB
description: The G.Skill Trident Z5 RGB 32GB is a premium, high-performance DDR5 RAM kit (typically sold as a 2x16 GB set) designed for enthusiasts and gamers. It features a sleek aluminum heat spreader, a customizable RGB light bar, and supports high speeds with low latency.
